sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: EFIV Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:EFIV
feed.summary: This article provides comprehensive details on the State Street SPDR S&P 500 ESG ETF (EFIV), including its current price, performance metrics, key statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and its investment strategy focused on ESG characteristics of S&P 500 companies. It also covers technical analysis, seasonal trends, and frequently asked questions about ETFs and EFIV specifically. The fund, launched on July 27, 2020, aims to track the S&P 500 Scored & Screened Index.

feed.title: New Johnson & Johnson lens data shows 96% distance spectacle independence
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson is set to present new clinical data for its TECNIS PureSee IOL at the ASCRS 2026 meeting, demonstrating excellent contrast sensitivity and an extended range of vision. The data, spanning two major studies, shows high patient satisfaction, low visual symptoms, and 96% spectacle independence for distance vision. This IOL is a next-generation Extended Depth of Focus (EDOF) lens designed to improve intermediate visual acuity while maintaining comparable distance visual acuity.

feed.title: Snap smart glasses to use Qualcomm chips
feed.summary: Snap Inc.'s smart glasses unit, Specs, will utilize Qualcomm's Snapdragon XR processor platform for its upcoming AI-powered eyewear, expected to launch later this year. This multi-year deal signifies a crucial step for Snap's hardware division and builds on their existing collaboration, aiming to compete in the growing smart glasses market despite recent investor scrutiny. Snap views smart glasses as a potential significant computing platform following smartphones.

feed.title: Walmart Inc stock: Why it's still a retail powerhouse for investors
feed.summary: Walmart Inc. continues to be a dominant force in the retail sector due to its extensive scale, robust e-commerce strategy, and strong financial health. The company's diversified model, including grocery sales and global expansion through formats like Sam's Club and Flipkart, along with significant investments in its supply chain and digital capabilities, positions it for continued resilience. While facing risks from labor costs, supply chain disruptions, and intense competition, analysts generally view Walmart positively for its defensive qualities, consistent dividends, and potential for long-term growth.

feed.title: Has Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Pulled Back Enough For A Fresh Look At Valuation?
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty's stock (ULTA) has seen recent pullbacks but still shows strong long-term returns. Simply Wall St's valuation analysis, using a Discounted Cash Flow model, suggests the stock is slightly overvalued by about 4.1% at its current price of US$532.79, indicating it is "ABOUT RIGHT." However, a Price-to-Earnings (P/E) comparison places it as "OVERVALUED" compared to its calculated "Fair Ratio" and the broader industry, although it's below some peers. The article also presents Bull and Bear case narratives with varying fair value estimates, encouraging investors to consider multiple perspectives.

feed.title: Draganfly CEO Cameron Chell to Appear on Fox Business’ Making Money with Charles Payne to Discuss Iran Conflict and the Strategic Role of Drone Warfare
feed.summary: Draganfly Inc. CEO Cameron Chell is scheduled to appear on Fox Business’ Making Money with Charles Payne on April 10, 2026, to discuss the Iran conflict and the strategic role of drone technology in modern warfare. Chell will provide expert commentary on how drones are reshaping geopolitical landscapes, their implications for U.S. military doctrine, and the importance of scalable drone technologies. Draganfly believes its platform is well-positioned to support evolving defense requirements with its proven, mission-ready technologies.

feed.title: 1,982 Shares in Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH Purchased by Whitaker Myers Wealth Managers LTD.
feed.summary: Whitaker Myers Wealth Managers LTD. has acquired 1,982 shares of Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) in Q4, valued at approximately $1.742 million, making it a new position for the firm. Despite this institutional buying, company insiders have been net sellers, offloading over 10,000 shares worth nearly $9.9 million in the last 90 days. Parker-Hannifin's recent financial performance showed it beat Q results with $7.65 EPS against an expected $7.11 and revenue up 9.1% year-over-year, leading analysts to rate the stock with a "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $996.60.

feed.title: Fox Business taps Draganfly CEO to discuss how drones shape war
feed.summary: Draganfly (NASDAQ: DPRO) CEO Cameron Chell will appear on Fox Business's "Making Money with Charles Payne" on April 10, 2026, to discuss the Iran conflict and the evolving strategic role of drone warfare. The segment will cover geopolitical impacts, U.S. military doctrine, scalable drone technologies, domestic manufacturing, and innovation speed, highlighting Draganfly's position in addressing defense and public-safety demands for unmanned systems.

feed.title: Motorola Solutions, Inc. $MSI Shares Sold by Vista Investment Partners II LLC
feed.summary: Vista Investment Partners II LLC significantly reduced its stake in Motorola Solutions (MSI) by 73.7% in Q4, selling 3,643 shares and retaining 1,301 shares worth $499,000. Despite this, institutional investors still hold a substantial 84.17% of the company. Additionally, senior insiders have seen considerable selling activity, with CEO Gregory Q. Brown selling 50,000 shares for $23.4 million, and a total of 129,069 insider shares sold over the past three months.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies (TYL) Price Target Lowered by BTIG | TYL Stoc

This adjustment follows several other analysts who also reduced their price targets for TYL in February 2026, while generally maintaining "Buy" or "Outperform" ratings. The average one-year price target from 20 analysts is $437.01, implying a significant upside from its current price.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Communication Services Companies: Meta Platforms (META) and AppLovin (APP)
feed.summary: Two analysts have issued bullish sentiments on Communication Services companies Meta Platforms (META) and AppLovin (APP). J.P. Morgan reiterated a Buy rating on Meta Platforms with an $825.00 price target, while Morgan Stanley maintained a Buy rating on AppLovin with a $720.00 price target. Both companies have an analyst consensus of Strong Buy, indicating positive outlooks from the investment community.

feed.title: TROW: BMO Capital Maintains Rating, Lowers Price Target to $98.0
feed.summary: BMO Capital has maintained its Market Perform rating on T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) but lowered its price target from $104.00 to $98.00, reflecting a -5.77% change. This adjustment aligns with a recent trend of cautious sentiment among analysts, with several other firms also reducing their price targets for TROW. Despite these cautious outlooks, the average target price from 10 analysts suggests a modest upside from the current stock price, while GuruFocus's GF Value estimates a more significant upside, indicating a potential divergence in valuation perspectives.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts Duke Energy Price Target to $143 From $136, Maintains Outperform Rating

This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on the utility company. The article also notes other recent analyst actions and news related to Duke Energy's operations.

feed.title: Argus Adjusts Price Target on NiSource to $52 From $45, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Argus has raised its price target for NiSource (NI) to $52 from $45, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst activities, including KeyBanc initiating coverage with an Overweight rating and a $52 price target, and several other firms also updating their price targets on the utility company. NiSource, a holding company primarily involved in natural gas distribution and electricity production/transmission, also recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share.

feed.title: Guggenheim Adjusts Price Target on AbbVie to $249 From $242, Maintains Buy Rating

The adjustment reflects an updated outlook on the biopharmaceutical company's financial prospects. This news comes amidst other recent news for AbbVie, including lawsuits related to drug discount programs and new product launches.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) Given New $98.00 Price Target at BMO Capital Markets

The company recently reported Q4 EPS of $2.44, narrowly missing estimates, with revenue up 6% year-over-year.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) Given New $420.00 Price Target at BTIG Research

The adjustment follows Tyler Technologies missing earnings and revenue estimates for the latest quarter, though revenue still saw a 6.3% year-over-year increase.

This adjustment follows e.l.f. Beauty's strong quarterly performance, where it exceeded EPS and revenue expectations and provided positive FY2026 guidance. feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) Price Target Raised to $187.00 at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) to $187.00 from $183.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, suggesting a potential upside of 15.54%. This adjustment follows ICE's strong quarterly earnings, which surpassed analyst estimates in both EPS and revenue. Despite positive analyst sentiment, the article also notes recent insider selling by CEO Jeffrey Sprecher and CTO Mayur Kapani.

feed.title: PACCAR’s Local-For-Local Manufacturing Bet Pays Off: Analysts Target $127
feed.summary: PACCAR (PCAR) is leveraging its local-for-local manufacturing strategy and strong parts/financial services segments to navigate a challenging market, with these segments now contributing 71% of total profit. Despite a Q4 2025 revenue dip, tariff advantages and recovering freight rates position PACCAR for earnings recovery, with analysts targeting $127 and predicting significant upside by 2030 based on a strong 2027 prebuy cycle and aftermarket gains. The company's $9.3 billion investment in R&D and capital secures its position with the newest truck lineup in the industry.

feed.title: Enovis to Host First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call on May 7th
feed.summary: Enovis Corporation announced it will host an investor conference call and live webcast on May 7th, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company, a medical technology growth firm, will issue an earnings press release earlier that morning. Investors can access the webcast and presentation via the "Investors" section of Enovis' website.

feed.title: Apple is closing stores in 3 states, joins list of retailers to shutter locations in challenging environment for malls
feed.summary: Apple announced it will close three retail stores in the U.S. this summer, located in California, Connecticut, and Maryland. This move highlights a broader trend of retailers like Apple adjusting to changing consumer behaviors and declining mall foot traffic, despite Apple's overall financial success. One of the closing stores is Apple's first unionized location in Towson Town Center.

feed.title: B of A Securities Raises Altria Group (MO) Price Target to $73 | MO Stock News
feed.summary: B of A Securities analyst Lisa Lewandowski has raised the price target for Altria Group (MO) from $72.00 to $73.00, maintaining a "Buy" rating. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook, following similar target increases from other firms like UBS and Citigroup in recent months. Despite the raised target, Wall Street analysts' average forecast suggests a slight downside from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a more significant downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Docebo (DCBO) price target decreased by 15.71% to 21.55
feed.summary: This article reports that the price target for Docebo (DCBO) has been decreased by 15.71%, bringing the new target to $21.55. No further details are provided in this brief update.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works Delivers 63rd Straight Dividend Hike, Nearly Tripling Payouts Since 2016
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) recently announced its 63rd consecutive dividend increase, continuing its status as a Dividend King. The latest quarterly payout is $1.61 per share, reflecting a 7% year-over-year increase. While the current dividend yield of 2.4% is below the 10-year Treasury yield, the company's strong free cash flow, consistent share buybacks, and historical price appreciation contribute to a robust total return profile for investors.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs vs. Morgan Stanley: Which Stock Has More Upside?
feed.summary: This article compares Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, two leading financial services giants, ahead of their Q1 2026 earnings reports. Both are expected to benefit from robust M&A activity, with Goldman Sachs potentially seeing a larger short-term boost due to its higher reliance on investment banking. However, Morgan Stanley is considered the better long-term buy due to its diversified revenue streams, including wealth management, and a slightly more attractive valuation.

feed.title: Snap and Qualcomm Expand Strategic Collaboration to Advance Intelligent Computing Experiences on Specs
feed.summary: Snap and Qualcomm Technologies have announced a multi-year strategic agreement to integrate Qualcomm's Snapdragon system-on-a-chip (SoC) into future generations of Specs, advanced eyewear designed to blend digital and physical experiences. This collaboration builds on over five years of partnership, aiming to enhance Specs with industry-leading capabilities like on-device AI and advanced graphics, providing a scalable platform for developers. The initiative underscores both companies' vision for more human-centric computing seamlessly integrated into daily life.

feed.title: 12 Industrials Stocks Moving In Friday's Pre-Market Session

Notable gainers include Smart Powerr Corp (CREG), Erayak Power Solution Gr (RAYA), and Urban-gro (UGRO), while Perpetuals.com (PDC) and Founder Group (FGL) are among the decliners. feed.title: Invesco Ltd. Announces March 31, 2026 Assets Under Management
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. announced its Assets Under Management (AUM) as of March 31, 2026. The information is provided by Refinitiv and is a concise update regarding the company's financial holdings.

feed.title: McDonald's CEO Explains Viral 'Big Arch' Burger Taste Test Flub
feed.summary: McDonald's CEO Chris Kempczinski addressed the viral backlash from his "Big Arch" burger taste test video, attributing his cautious bite to his mother's advice about not talking with his mouth full. Despite the online mockery, Kempczinski views the extensive social media conversation as a positive, driving awareness for the new menu item. The incident highlights the challenges executives face in real-time marketing within the age of instant online feedback.

feed.title: [8-K] Invesco Ltd. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. reported preliminary assets under management (AUM) of $2,159.5 billion as of March 31, 2026, marking a 4.4% decrease from the previous month. This decline was primarily due to unfavorable market returns impacting AUM by $91 billion and negative FX movements of $7.0 billion, despite net long-term inflows of $0.3 billion. The company also reported money market net outflows of $1.8 billion.

feed.title: Westbourne Investments Inc. Acquires New Position in ONEOK, Inc. $OKE
feed.summary: Westbourne Investments Inc. has acquired a new stake in ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) during the fourth quarter, purchasing 23,675 shares valued at approximately $1.74 million. Other major institutional investors also increased their holdings, with institutional ownership now at roughly 69.13%. ONEOK recently beat Q4 earnings estimates, provided optimistic FY2026 guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend to $1.07 per share.

feed.title: Westbourne Investments Inc. Takes $995,000 Position in Altria Group, Inc. $MO
feed.summary: Westbourne Investments Inc. recently acquired a new stake of 17,261 shares in Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) during the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $995,000. This comes as Altria announced a quarterly dividend of $1.06 per share, resulting in an annualized dividend of $4.24 and a 6.3% yield. Despite a senior vice president trimming their holdings, analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $65.75 for the stock.

feed.title: Snap unit to use Qualcomm chips for upcoming AI smart glasses
feed.summary: Snap's smart glasses unit, Specs, will utilize Qualcomm's Snapdragon XR processor platform for its upcoming AI smart glasses, continuing a long-standing partnership. This strategic move positions Specs to compete with Meta's successful Ray-Ban AI smart glasses and offers the unit more independence while opening avenues for external investment. The announcement follows activist investor pressure on Snap to spin off or shutter the Specs unit.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc stock: What you should know now
feed.summary: This report analyzes Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc, highlighting its innovative pipeline, key products like Eylea and Dupixent, and strong financial health as factors attracting investors. It also discusses the company's competitive advantages, such as proprietary technologies and strategic partnerships, while noting risks like patent expirations and clinical trial failures. Overall, analysts view Regeneron favorably for its sustained performance and growth potential in the biotech sector.

feed.title: Snap and Qualcomm sign multi-year deal for XR chip technology
feed.summary: Snap Inc. and Qualcomm Technologies have entered into a multi-year strategic agreement for Qualcomm's Snapdragon system-on-a-chip technology to be integrated into Specs, Snap's new eyewear. This partnership will power the standalone, see-through glasses with Snapdragon XR platforms, enabling advanced on-device AI and computing for augmented reality experiences. The collaboration builds on over five years of partnership and aims to develop capabilities for on-device AI, graphics processing, and multiuser digital experiences for the Specs platform.

feed.title: BTIG Adjusts Price Target on Tyler Technologies to $420 From $470, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: BTIG has revised its price target for Tyler Technologies (TYL) down to $420 from $470, while reiterating a "Buy" rating on the stock. Tyler Technologies specializes in information management software for the public sector, offering solutions in financial management, education, public safety, and other governmental areas. The company's revenue streams primarily come from subscriptions, maintenance services, and professional services.

feed.title: BMO Capital Remains a Buy on Phillips 66 (PSX)
feed.summary: BMO Capital maintained a Buy rating on Phillips 66 (PSX) with a price target of $195.00, following strong quarterly revenues of $34.02 billion and a net profit of $2.91 billion. Despite this, insider sentiment shows increased selling activity, including a recent significant sale by the EVP & CFO. Citi, however, maintained a Hold rating on the stock.

feed.title: Snap and Qualcomm Expand Strategic Collaboration to Advance Intelligent Computing Experiences on Specs
feed.summary: Specs Inc., a Snap subsidiary, and Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. announced a multi-year strategic agreement to power future generations of Specs with Qualcomm Technologies’ industry-leading Snapdragon system-on-a-chip (SoC). This collaboration builds on over five years of innovation between the two companies and aims to bring advanced capabilities like on-device AI, cutting-edge graphics, and multiuser digital experiences to the Specs platform. The agreement seeks to establish a scalable foundation for developers and partners, facilitating the creation of increasingly sophisticated digital experiences for Specs users.

feed.title: Enovis will release first-quarter results before a May 7 webcast
feed.summary: Enovis (NYSE: ENOV) will host a conference call and live webcast on May 7, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results, with an earnings press release issued earlier that morning. Investors can access the live webcast and presentation materials via the Investors section of Enovis' website. The company is an innovation-driven medical technology growth company focused on developing clinically differentiated solutions.

feed.title: $91B market slide cut Invesco assets to $2.16 trillion in March
feed.summary: Invesco (NYSE: IVZ) reported its preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) for March 31, 2026, which stood at $2,159.5 billion, a 4.4% decrease from the previous month. This decline was primarily due to a $91 billion negative impact from market performance and a $7.0 billion reduction from unfavorable foreign exchange movements. Despite $0.3 billion in net long-term inflows, these were offset by $1.8 billion in money market outflows.

feed.title: New York Stock Exchange Celebrates 50 Years of NYSE Arca Options Trading
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange is celebrating 50 years of options trading on NYSE Arca Options, marked by San Francisco Mayor Daniel Lurie ringing the Closing Bell. NYSE Arca Options has been a leading electronic options market, ranking first in multi-listed electronic volume since 2021, and continues to expand its offerings including an agreement with MSCI Inc. for benchmark MSCI indexes. The exchange, which started in San Francisco in 1976 as the Pacific Stock Exchange, has significantly contributed to the growth of the U.S. options industry, processing billions of messages and millions of contracts daily.

feed.title: New York Stock Exchange Celebrates 50 Years of NYSE Arca Options Trading
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange is celebrating 50 years of options trading on NYSE Arca Options, marking the occasion by having San Francisco Mayor Daniel Lurie ring the Closing Bell. NYSE Arca Options, which originated from the Pacific Stock Exchange in 1976, has become a leading platform in the industry, ranking first in multi-listed electronic volume since 2021 and expanding its product offerings. The exchange's success is attributed to its scalable technology, NYSE Pillar, which has supported substantial industry growth.

feed.title: Western Digital Reaches New 52-Week High, Analysts Remain Bullish
feed.summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) has achieved a new 52-week stock high, closing at $346.04, driven by strong financial performance and positive analyst sentiment. Several equity research firms like Rosenblatt Securities, Wedbush, and Cantor Fitzgerald maintain 'buy' recommendations, citing the company's success in the data storage market and a 25.2% year-over-year revenue increase. This performance is seen as a key indicator for the broader technology and semiconductor sectors.

feed.title: Revvity to Hold Earnings Call on Tuesday, May 5, 2026
feed.summary: Revvity, Inc. (NYSE: RVTY) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company will host a conference call at 7:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss these results, led by President and CEO Prahlad Singh and CFO Max Krakowiak. A live audio webcast will be available on Revvity's Investors section website.

feed.title: Snap & Qualcomm Announce Long-term Partnership, Affirm 2026 Launch for 'Specs' Consumer AR Glasses
feed.summary: Snap's new XR subsidiary, Specs Inc, and Qualcomm have announced a multi-year partnership to develop Snap's upcoming AR glasses. The collaboration will integrate Qualcomm's Snapdragon chips, aiming to bring advanced features like on-device AI and cutting-edge graphics. Both companies also reaffirmed that Snap's next-generation Specs, which will be the company's second pair of AR glasses and are expected to be smaller and lighter with see-through AR optics, are scheduled for release later in 2026.

feed.title: Zacks Research Raises Q2 EPS Estimates for Caterpillar
feed.summary: Zacks Research has increased its Q2 2026 earnings estimates for Caterpillar Inc. to $5.39 per share, up from $5.28, signaling a stronger outlook for the industrial products company. This upward revision suggests accelerating demand for Caterpillar's equipment and services, potentially indicating a broader economic recovery. Several other brokerages also maintain a 'Buy' rating on the stock, further reflecting positive sentiment.

feed.title: CSP Inc stock: Fresh Cato Networks award signals partner strength
feed.summary: CSP Inc (NASDAQ: CSPI) received the 2026 Americas Regional Partner of the Year award from Cato Networks, highlighting its strength in cybersecurity and secure networking solutions. This recognition could attract investor attention, as CSP Inc operates in the high-growth cybersecurity and edge computing markets, serving defense and commercial clients. The company's dual revenue stream from high-performance hardware and IT services offers a resilient business model, though investors should monitor execution risks and potential client concentration.

feed.title: Here Are Friday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Autodesk, Delek US Holdings, Insmed, Nike, Nutanix, ServiceNow, Shake Shack, Southern Copper, Veeva Systems, and More
feed.summary: This article provides a compilation of top Wall Street analyst research calls from Friday, April 10, 2026, including upgrades, downgrades, and new initiations for various companies such as Autodesk, Nike, Shake Shack, and Southern Copper. It also gives an overview of market performance the previous day, touching on stock futures, treasury bonds, oil and gas, gold, and cryptocurrency markets.
